extraction.one_line_summary: VAN AERT Wout attacked solo from yellow jersey on final categorized climb Côte du Cap Blanc-Nez, held ~10 seconds to finish in TT mode
tactical_patterns: VAN AERT attacked as race leader on final cat-4 climb, exploiting marking confusion when yellow jersey initiates rather than responds
LAPORTE Christophe led out peloton sprint despite teammate solo ahead, suggesting Jumbo-Visma hedged against VAN AERT being caught
GC riders POGACAR/VINGEGAARD both lost 18 seconds to yellow jersey on stage presumed controlled, revealing lack of positioning discipline

rider_signals.VAN AERT Wout: positive: attacked from yellow on categorized climb then sustained solo TT effort, showing willingness to spend matches early in race
rider_signals.POGACAR Tadej: negative: lost 18 seconds on presumed easy flat stage, now 32 seconds down due to positioning failure not physiological weakness
rider_signals.VINGEGAARD Jonas: negative: lost 18 seconds same as POGACAR despite Jumbo-Visma teammate winning, indicating team prioritized stage over GC protection
rider_signals.LAPORTE Christophe: positive: led peloton sprint while teammate soloed ahead, demonstrating team's depth and tactical flexibility for dual outcomes
